version_description: 80’s pop-rock from George Michael here. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Interludes play as intro. Bridge plays as verse 1 followed by verse 2 with alternate melody. Refrain plays as chorus with alternate melody. Outro plays a chorus repeating to fade with many ad-libs.

versions.version_description: Complete version,This song was Number One in the UK during 1984,then releases in the USA during 1985 and charted wellplay on acoustic or Electric Guitar with Chorus,Reverb and a little Delay effects.You Tube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BFwOs-jy53A This is the official one track starts at 1.14.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go

content:
*The song is recorded slightly sharp. Use a chromatic tuner with A=452HZ to play along with the record.


Chord Voicings:

C: X32010
C/E: X7555X
F: XX3211
Fsus2: XX3011
Fmaj7: XX3210
Cadd2: X30010
G/B: X2X033
G6/B: X2X330
Dm: XX0231
Dsus2: XX0230
Dm7: XX0211
D7sus2: XX0210
Am: X02210
G: 3X0003
Gadd2: 3X0203
Gsus4: 3X0013
Asus4: X02230
Fsus4: XX3311
Bb/F: X88766
[ch]C/E[/ch]*: 032010
[ch]F[/ch]*: 133211
[tab][ch]Gsus4[/ch]*: 355533
G6: 3X0000[/tab]



[Intro]
N.C.
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
       Do do do[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
       Oh oh oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Fsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]C/E[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
       De do de do de do, do de do de do do do[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 Every day I hear a different story[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]                        [ch]G6/B[/ch]
 People saying that you're no good for me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]D7sus2[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
 Saw your lover with a-nother and she's makin  a fool of you, oh-oh[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 If you love me baby you'd deny it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]                        [ch]G6/B[/ch]
 But you laugh and tell me I should try it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]D7sus2[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
 Tell me I'm a baby, and I don't under-stand[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gadd2[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
But you know that I'll for-give you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gsus4[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Just this once, twice, for-ever cause baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Gsus4[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Asus4[/ch]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Gadd2[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
You could drag me to hell and back, just as long as we're to-gether, and you do[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]C/E[/ch]       [ch]Fsus4[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch]   [ch]C/G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
I don't want your free - dom, I don't want to play a-round[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]C/E[/ch]     [ch]Fsus4[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]     [ch]C/G[/ch]       [ch]Gsus4[/ch]
I don't want no-body  baby, part time love just brings me down[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]C/E[/ch]       [ch]Bb/F[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch]* [ch]F[/ch]* [ch]Gsus4[/ch]*      [ch]G6[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
I don't need your free-dom,         girl all I want right now is you[/tab]


[Interlude 1]
[tab][ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
     Do do do[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
       Whoa oh yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Fsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]C/E[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
       De do de do de do, do de do de do do do[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 Like a prisoner who has his own key[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]                    [ch]G6/B[/ch]
 But I can't escape un-til you love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]D7sus2[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
 I just go from day to day knowing all a-bout the other boys[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]Cadd2[/ch]         [ch]G/B[/ch]                 [ch]G6/B[/ch]
 You take my hand and tell me I'm a fool to give you all that I do[/tab]
